items.description: List of relative config file paths to look for

codesettings.jsonc_filetype.description:
Set filetype to jsonc when opening a file specified by `config_file_paths`,
make sure you have the json tree-sitter parser installed for highlighting
codesettings.jsonc_filetype.markdownDescription:
Set filetype to jsonc when opening a file specified by `config_file_paths`,
make sure you have the json tree-sitter parser installed for highlighting

codesettings.jsonls_integration.description: Integrate with jsonls to provide LSP completion for LSP settings based on schemas
codesettings.jsonls_integration.markdownDescription: Integrate with jsonls to provide LSP completion for LSP settings based on schemas

codesettings.live_reload.description:
Enable live reloading of settings when config files change
via the `workspace/didChangeConfiguration` notification; after notifying,
an autocmd `User CodesettingsFilesChanged` will be emitted. You
can use this autocmd to handle edge cases like restarting servers
that don't respond to `workspace/didChangeConfiguration` by
restarting it.
codesettings.live_reload.markdownDescription:
Enable live reloading of settings when config files change
via the `workspace/didChangeConfiguration` notification; after notifying,
an autocmd `User CodesettingsFilesChanged` will be emitted. You
can use this autocmd to handle edge cases like restarting servers
that don't respond to `workspace/didChangeConfiguration` by
restarting it.

codesettings.loader_extensions.description: List of loader extensions to use when loading settings; `string` values will be `require`d

items.description: List of module paths, or inline extension instances

codesettings.loader_extensions.markdownDescription: List of loader extensions to use when loading settings; `string` values will be `require`d

codesettings.lua_ls_integration.description:
Set up library paths for `lua_ls` automatically to pick up the generated type
annotations provided by codesettings.nvim; to enable for only your nvim config,
you can also do something like:
lua_ls_integration = function()
  return vim.uv.cwd() == ('%%s/.config/nvim'):format(vim.env.HOME)
end,
This integration also works for emmylua_ls
codesettings.lua_ls_integration.markdownDescription:
Set up library paths for `lua_ls` automatically to pick up the generated type
annotations provided by codesettings.nvim; to enable for only your nvim config,
you can also do something like:
lua_ls_integration = function()
  return vim.uv.cwd() == ('%%s/.config/nvim'):format(vim.env.HOME)
end,
This integration also works for emmylua_ls

codesettings.root_dir.description:
Provide your own root dir; can be a string or function returning a string.
It should be/return the full absolute path to the root directory.
If not set, defaults to `require('codesettings.util').get_root()`
codesettings.root_dir.markdownDescription:
Provide your own root dir; can be a string or function returning a string.
It should be/return the full absolute path to the root directory.
If not set, defaults to `require('codesettings.util').get_root()`
